title: Salty Beef Skillet
description: A hearty and savory skillet dish from Ukraine, made with tender beef and a hint of saltiness.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir in salt and black pepper.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors are combined.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
